news.t: State Street Investment Management Launches Investment-Grade Public and Private ABS ETF

overview.description: The State Street IG Public & Private ABS ETF (PRAB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in both public and private asset-backed securities of various maturities. The fund selects investment grade ABS, which may include non-US debt securities. PRAB was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: State Street Investment Management Launches Investment-Grade Public and Private ABS ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Investment Management today announced the launch of the State Street® IG Public & Private ABS ETF (PRAB), an actively managed exchange-traded fund designed to exp...
